title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese identifies four rules for effectively prompting Claude Code based on how Anthropic engineers use it: prompt skills rather than generic queries, treat skills as modular reusable components beyond simple prompts, build composable skills instead of one-off custom solutions, and allow skills to improve over successive sessions. The rules are framed as commonly overlooked practices that improve AI system performance.
